Drift gently off to blissful night of sleep with Meraki Roots CBD Sleep Capsules. Such a large number of people are affected by poor sleep. An improper night's sleep can lead to grogginess, mental fog, and many mental and physical health problems.

Our Moon Caps contain melatonin to help promote ease as well as the quality of sleep by helping develop a regular sleep schedule, and helps people achieve proper REM cycles, which lead to motivation and restored energy upon waking.
